heading: Providing information to Congress
label: 3125 Providing information to Congress
text: Nothing in this subchapter may be construed as authority to withhold information from the Congress or from a committee of either House of Congress.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 425 of this title
